title: arthromeris pinnata
intro: Arthromeris pinnata is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the "Chinese tuck fern" or "tuck fern", characterized by its unique pinnate leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Arthromeris pinnata include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be dried and processed into capsules or tablets for use in herbal supplements.
